docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOX, KAYLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RASMUSSEN, KARA $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100.00, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH EXCESSIVE RENT CLAIM WHICH SHOULD HAVE BEEN FILED WITH RENT BOARD. NO NEED FOR A STAKEOUT BECAUSE THERE WAS A VALID SUBSERVICE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO GIVE PROPER NOTICE SO DEFENDANT WAS ENTITLED TO $900.00 RENT. NO BAD FAITH SHOWN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
JUDGMENT CRDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOX, KAYLA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT RASMUSSEN, KARA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,341.28 FILED BY FOX, KAYLA AS TO DEFENDANT RASMUSSEN, KARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 SERVED NOV-16-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RASMUSSEN, KARA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT RASMUSSEN, KARA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT RASMUSSEN, KARA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $800.00) SERVED DEC-18-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RASMUSSEN, KARA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY FOX, KAYLA RASMUSSEN, KARA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF KAYLA FOX IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARA RASMUSSEN IS PRESENT. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2018 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT RASMUSSEN, KARA
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $1,118.68 RE 35336 FOR TRANSACTION W0518504D008 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO KAYLA FOX, DOC #1909125689, WARRANT #38205322, DATED JUN-18-2018
